Sql: SELECT TOP 500 o.OrderID, o.OrderDate, c.CompanyName, o.ShipCountry, o.Freight FROM Orders o INNER JOIN Customers c ON o.CustomerID = c.CustomerID ORDER BY o.OrderDate DESC

SELECT TOP 500 p.ProductID, p.ProductName, c.CategoryName, s.CompanyName AS SupplierName, p.UnitPrice, p.UnitsInStock, p.Discontinued FROM Products p INNER JOIN Categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID INNER JOIN Suppliers s ON p.SupplierID = s.SupplierID ORDER BY c.CategoryName, p.ProductName
